assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response includes recurring maintenance windows with 'FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA,SU' for weekend-only scheduling in both Terraform and gcloud configurations

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The gcloud script includes commands with --maintenance-window-start, --maintenance-window-end, and --maintenance-window-recurrence parameters for weekend scheduling

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response configures maintenance exclusions for Q1, Q2, Q3, and Q4 code freezes, each spanning approximately 15-16 days within the 30-day limit

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes a specific maintenance exclusion named 'annual-audit-november-2024' covering the entire November month for the audit period

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limitation for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual upgrades and auto-upgrades with respect to maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response uses 'REGULAR' channel and mentions 'STABLE' in a comment but does not specifically recommend combining maintenance windows with Stable/Extended channels for maximum control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The bash script includes gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope for each exclusion period

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or provide guidance on managing version drift
